info.title: Online_presence
info.description: Unified OpenAPI specification for online_presence domain

get.description: Lists widget configurations for the authenticated business. **Business token** required.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: e.g. `created_at:desc` or `updated_at:asc`. Direction defaults to `asc` if omitted.

404.description: Not found (masked as 404 for business mismatch in some cases)

422.description: Semantic validation or bad query (e.g. legacy sort params)

errors.message: sort field must be one of: created_at, updated_at, business_uid

post.description: Creates a widget configuration for a business. **Business token** required; optional **Staff token** for attribution (`owner_id`).

400.description: Malformed request syntax (e.g., invalid JSON payload)

get.description: Returns one configuration by uid scoped to the authenticated business. **Business token** required.

put.description: Updates an existing configuration. **Business token** required; optional **Staff token**.

400.description: Malformed request syntax (e.g., invalid JSON payload)

delete.description: Deletes a configuration by uid for the authenticated business and returns the deleted configuration (`{ success: true, data }`). **Business token** required.

200.description: The deleted widget configuration (`{ success: true, data }`)

get.description: Returns paginated conversations for the authenticated business. **Staff tokens** required.

parameters.name: include_simulated
parameters.description: When true, includes conversations created by AI Receptionist simulation and training flows. Simulated conversations are excluded by default.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort expression in `field:asc|desc` format. Allowed fields: `ended_at`, `started_at`, `created_at`, `updated_at`. Default sort is `ended_at:desc`.

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Filter conversations ending on or after this ISO 8601 date-time.

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: Filter conversations ending on or before this ISO 8601 date-time.

200.description: List result (`{ success: true, data: { conversations, total } }`)

errors.message: sort field must be one of: ended_at, started_at, created_at, updated_at

post.description: Creates a conversation for the authenticated business. **Staff tokens** required.

errors.message: business_uid does not match authenticated business
ended_at must be a valid ISO 8601 date string
started_at must be a valid ISO 8601 date string

get.description: Returns a single conversation by uid for the authenticated business. **Staff tokens** required.

put.description: Updates a conversation by uid. **Staff tokens** required.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a conversation and returns the soft-deleted conversation (`{ success: true, data }`). **Staff tokens** required.

200.description: The soft-deleted conversation (`{ success: true, data }`)

get.description: Returns the AI chat configuration for the authenticated business. Available for **Staff tokens**.

404.description: Not Found — no AI chat configuration exists for this business yet.

errors.message: AI chat configuration not found for this business

put.description: Creates or updates the AI chat configuration for the authenticated business. Provided fields are merged with existing values; omitted fields are unchanged. Available for **Staff tokens**.

example.faq_and_guidance: Answer questions about pricing, emergency calls, and availability.

lead_intent_data.lead_message_to_visitor: Please share your contact details and we will follow up shortly.

ai_actions.when_to_offer: Offer when client asks about scheduling.

errors.description: List of error details describing what failed.

field.description: Request field that failed validation, when applicable.

errors.description: List of error details describing what failed.

field.description: Request field that failed validation, when applicable.

WelcomeButton.description: Quick-reply button shown under the welcome message in the Web AI Widget.

label.description: Button label shown to the visitor.

message.description: Message text sent to the assistant when the button is clicked.

ActionConfigItem.description: A single client-portal action in the stored widget configuration. Order follows array position in the API.

uid.description: Portal action UID. Required by the API for persisted actions; nullable only for legacy/backfill reads.

label.description: Display label override; omit or null to resolve from portal defaults.

availability.description: Whether this action is available in the widget.

should_offer.description: Whether the assistant should proactively suggest this action.

when_to_offer.description: Guidance text for when the assistant should proactively suggest this action.

LeadIntentDataItem.description: Intent-based lead capture instructions used by the Web AI Widget assistant. Each item defines one intent and the data that should be collected for it.

lead_intent.description: Lead intent name (e.g., "General inquiry", "Book consultation"). Null/empty resolves to defaults according to backend normalization rules.

lead_data_items.description: Comma-separated lead fields to collect for this intent (e.g., "Name,Email,Phone").

lead_message_to_visitor.description: Guidance text for how the assistant should explain what is being collected and what happens next while capturing lead details.

widget_title.description: Widget title shown in the chat header.

faq_and_guidance.description: Business FAQ and guidance text used by the assistant.

business_hours.description: Business hours text shown to visitors or used for assistant guidance.

welcome_message.description: Message shown when the widget chat opens.

logo_url.description: Public logo URL shown in the widget.

actions.description: Ordered list of configured portal actions.

auto_popup_enabled.description: Whether the widget auto-opens for visitors.

welcome_buttons.description: Quick-reply buttons shown under the welcome message.

lead_capture_text.description: Prompt text used when collecting visitor lead details.

lead_intent_data.description: Per-intent lead-capture configuration: which fields to collect and how to message the visitor for each detected intent (max 10).

button_text.description: Launcher button label shown before opening the widget.

include_contact_info.description: Whether contact information is included in assistant context.

include_services.description: Whether business services are included in assistant context.

include_products.description: Whether products are included in assistant context.

include_booking_policies.description: Whether booking policies are included in assistant context.

include_terms_of_service.description: Whether terms of service are included in assistant context.

guidance_urls.description: List of public URLs used as additional assistant guidance sources.

RequestUpdateWidgetConfiguration.description: Partial update request. All fields are optional.

widget_title.description: Widget title shown in the chat header.

faq_and_guidance.description: Business FAQ and guidance text used by the assistant.

business_hours.description: Business hours text shown to visitors or used for assistant guidance.

welcome_message.description: Message shown when the widget chat opens.

brand_color.description: Widget brand color in hex format.

text_color.description: Widget text color in hex format.

logo_url.description: Public logo URL shown in the widget.

actions.description: Ordered list of configured portal actions.

auto_popup_enabled.description: Whether the widget auto-opens for visitors.

welcome_buttons.description: Quick-reply buttons shown under the welcome message.

lead_capture_text.description: Prompt text used when collecting visitor lead details.

lead_intent_data.description: Per-intent lead-capture configuration: which fields to collect and how to message the visitor for each detected intent (max 10).

button_text.description: Launcher button label shown before opening the widget.

include_contact_info.description: Whether contact information is included in assistant context.

include_services.description: Whether business services are included in assistant context.

include_products.description: Whether products are included in assistant context.

include_booking_policies.description: Whether booking policies are included in assistant context.

include_terms_of_service.description: Whether terms of service are included in assistant context.

guidance_urls.description: List of public URLs used as additional assistant guidance sources.

widget_configurations.description: Widget configurations for the authenticated business on the current page.

total.description: Total number of widget configurations across all pages.

ChatTranscriptDocument.description: Structured transcript object captured when a session ends. Uses the same visitor-visible message list shape returned by chat session resume APIs.

messages.content: I need to book an appointment.

ChatVisitorMessage.description: Visitor-visible chat line (**user** or **assistant**). Used in chat resume responses and stored inside `ChatTranscriptDocument` for persisted conversations. System prompts and internal tool rows are not included.

at.description: Optional ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the server recorded the turn. May be omitted on older Redis session blobs; clients may use it for ordering or display outside the embeddable widget.

example.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

VoiceConversationMetadata.description: Voice-specific metadata for AI Receptionist calls, including caller/callee numbers and recording details when available.

from_number.description: Caller phone number in E.164 format.

to_number.description: Dialed voicecalls phone number in E.164 format.

recording_url.description: Signed call recording URL generated by voicecalls.

recording_received_at.description: Time when webaiwidgetserver received the recording callback.

session_id.description: Chat session identifier associated with this persisted conversation.

business_uid.description: Business UID for this conversation. Must match the authenticated business context.

transcript.description: Structured transcript JSON (`ChatTranscriptDocument`) when closing a session; optional JSON string encoding for compatibility.

contact_full_name.description: Visitor full name captured during the chat.

contact_email.description: Visitor email captured during the chat.

contact_phone.description: Visitor phone captured during the chat.

page_url.description: Page URL where the chat was started.

started_at.description: Conversation start timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

ended_at.description: Conversation end timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

client_uid.description: Optional CRM client UID linked to this conversation.

message_count.description: Number of visitor-visible messages in the conversation.

lead_intent.description: Lead intent extracted or assigned for this conversation (e.g., "General inquiry").

lead_information.description: Lead key/value data captured from the conversation.

source_app_uid.description: Application that delivered the inbound traffic for this conversation.

channel_uid.description: Channel identifier used for attribution in AI Receptionist reporting.

voice_call_uid.description: Internal voicecalls call UID used to correlate voice callbacks.

external_uuid.description: External provider conversation UUID, usually the Vonage conversation UUID.

conversations.description: Conversations for the authenticated business on the current page.

total.description: Total number of conversations across all pages.

NestHttpException_ai_receptionist_conver.description: Standard v3 error envelope for online_presence chat APIs.

errors.description: List of error details describing what failed.

field.description: Request field that failed validation, when applicable.

transcript.description: Structured transcript or JSON string; optional staff edits.

contact_full_name.description: Visitor full name captured during the chat.

contact_email.description: Visitor email captured during the chat.

contact_phone.description: Visitor phone captured during the chat.

page_url.description: Page URL where the chat was started.

lead_intent.description: Lead intent value for staff edits.

lead_information.description: Lead key/value data for staff edits.

UpsertAiChatConfigRequest.description: Request body for upserting the AI chat configuration. All fields are optional — only provided fields are merged with existing values.

faq_and_guidance.description: Free-text FAQ and guidance instructions for the AI receptionist.

business_hours.description: Business hours text; null uses calendar-derived defaults.

lead_data_items.description: Comma-separated or free-text list of lead fields to collect.

lead_message_to_visitor.description: Guidance text for how the AI chat receptionist should explain what is being collected and what happens next.

lead_capture_text.description: Default lead-capture message shown to clients.

include_contact_info.description: Whether to include business contact info in AI guidance context.

include_services.description: Whether to include business services in AI guidance context.

include_products.description: Whether to include business products in AI guidance context.

include_booking_policies.description: Whether to include booking policies in AI guidance context.

include_terms_of_service.description: Whether to include terms of service in AI guidance context.

guidance_urls.description: Extra URLs whose content is merged into AI guidance.

should_offer.description: Whether the AI should proactively suggest this action.

when_to_offer.description: Guidance text for when the AI should suggest this action.

Bearer.description: Provide a valid bearer token in the Authorization header. Example: 'Authorization: Bearer {app_token}'

AiReceptionistConversations.description: **Staff tokens** — business context is taken from the token for conversations.

WidgetConfigurations.description: Business token (and optional Staff token where the API supports attribution). The business is derived from the authenticated token.

tags.name: Online Presence conversations
tags.description: Persisted AI Receptionist conversations for the authenticated business (**Staff tokens**).

tags.name: AI Chat Configuration
tags.description: AI chat behavior configuration for the authenticated business (**Staff tokens**).
